The Lexical-Relation chart shows the most dramatic shift for Language-only, where it passes many other lines as data scales up, while Semantic-feature Prediction also shows notable gains from bottom to middle range.

Looking at the legend order across all charts, the final ranking appears to be DINO-ViT-Trainable at the top, followed by DINO-ResS0, MAE-ViT, DiNOv2-ViT, DINO-ViT, Language-only, Random-ViT, and Random-ViT-Trainable at the bottom. Language-only's relative position improves most dramatically in the Lexical-Relation chart, where it climbs from what looks like the lowest starting point to crossing above several other methods. the Semantic-feature Prediction chart actually shows Language-only converging toward the top by 640K, starting from near the bottom. But looking at the Lexical-Relation Prediction chart more closely, that's where I see the most striking shift—Language-only crosses multiple lines as it climbs from near last to a much higher position, making that the clearest example of dramatic ranking improvement.

content.text:
<think>
Looking at the four charts in the image: Word Relatedness, Semantic-feature Prediction, Lexical-Relation Prediction, and Part-Of-Speech Prediction.

The x-axis goes from 4.3K to 640K (and beyond) Image-Caption Pairs.

For the "Language-only" line (identified in the legend):

**Word Relatedness**: Language-only starts around mid-pack (~5th-6th) at 4.3K and remains roughly in the same ranking position.

**Semantic-feature Prediction**: Language-only appears near the bottom at 4.3K and rises somewhat.

**Lexical-Relation Prediction**: At 4.3K, Language-only appears near the very bottom (last or near-last). By 640K, it rises dramatically, crossing several other lines and moving toward the top half of the rankings.

**Part-Of-Speech Prediction**: Language-only starts at or near the bottom and appears to stay relatively low.

In the Lexical-Relation Prediction chart, the Language-only line makes the most dramatic upward movement in relative ranking — starting near last place at 4.3K and moving up to pass multiple lines by 640K, showing the greatest improvement in relative ranking among all four tasks.
</think>

<answer>
Lexical-Relation Prediction

In this task, the Language-only line starts near the very bottom of the rankings at 4.3K image-caption pairs, but by 640K it rises dramatically to cross above multiple other lines, showing the greatest improvement in relative ranking compared to the other tasks (Word Relatedness, Semantic-feature Prediction, and Part-Of-Speech Prediction).
</answer>
